entity.summary: Aurora-native automated market maker preserved in current exchange and protocol registries with continuing liquidity.
entity.notes: Current protocol data preserves Amaterasu Finance as an Aurora-native AMM and reports continuing TVL. CoinGecko discovery data preserves the exchange identity and app.amaterasu.fi domain. The first-party application was not independently rendered in this review pass, so the URL status remains unknown while the exchange is classified active from current protocol liquidity.
